plugins.name: go-bounded-context-hexagonal
plugins.description: Bounded-Context Hexagonal architecture for Go CLI and backend service applications — port/adapter boundaries, package layout, wiring, and modular monolith patterns.

plugins.name: go-engineering-policy
plugins.description: Go engineering policies and coding conventions — constructors, variable scope, project structure, and style overrides.

plugins.name: todo-plan
plugins.description: Create a throwaway TODO working note for a multi-step task — capture the agreed Plan and an empty Progress checklist for hand-off to execution.

plugins.name: todo
plugins.description: Resume work on a TODO working note (the primary command) — no argument lists open notes to pick from, or pass a slug to continue from the next unchecked step.

plugins.name: todo-done
plugins.description: Finish a TODO — verify its durable knowledge was extracted into docs/comments/commit, then delete the working note.
